channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Summer Games Done Quick once again raises over $2 million for Doctors Without Borders
item.description: The annual speedrunning marathon event ran from July 5-11.

item.title: Last chance to score 135+ handpicked Prime Day deals in Australia before the sale ends tonight — up to 76% off Bose, Dyson, Shark, Ninja & more
item.description: Amazon Prime Day 2026 has been impressive, with all-time low prices on Kindles, air fryers, smartwatches, robot vacuums and more, but the sale ends tonight, July 13, so hurry and grab those last-minute deals now.

item.title: What are your plans for AI Appreciation Day?
item.description: The best way to celebrate AI Appreciation Day is to not.

item.title: Lorde says Ray-Ban Meta AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
item.description: Lorde was performing at the Real Cool Festival in Madrid on Thursday and took some time during her set to speak out against AI glasses. While she didn't specify any brands in particular, it's likely she was taking a shot at festival sponsor Ray-Ban, which has collaborated with Meta on a pair of AI smartglasses. […]

item.title: 'The end of an era': China enforces mandatory rule to cull inefficient solar panels, signals end of ultra-cheap PV price wars
item.description: China introduces mandatory solar efficiency standards that could remove outdated factories, reduce oversupply, and reshape competition across the photovoltaic industry.

item.title: Pentagon releases new batch of UFO files, China's Tianwen-2 reaches its asteroid target, and more science stories
item.description: Catch up on the most interesting science news from the last week.
